title: 'That's why he's the king' - Messi sets up third World Cup final
summary: Lionel Messi delivered a masterclass performance on the right wing, setting up crucial goals in Argentina's semi-final comeback. His display was instrumental in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England. The performance underscored Messi's continued excellence at tournament level.
content: BBC Sport looks at Lionel Messi's masterclass on the right wing to knock England out of the World Cup.

zh.title: "这就是他为什么是国王" - 梅西创造第三次世界杯决赛
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在右边锋位置表现精彩，在阿根廷半决赛的反击中助攻关键进球。他的表现对阿根廷以2-1击败英格兰起到了重要作用。这场比赛充分体现了梅西在锦标赛中的持续卓越表现。

title: 'He was my biggest fan' - BBC pundit Richards' father dies
summary: BBC football pundit Micah Richards' father Lincoln passed away shortly before England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina. Richards paid tribute to his father during the broadcast of the match. The personal tragedy intersected with a major sporting event.
content: Micah Richards pays tribute to his father Lincoln, who died shortly before the BBC pundit went on air for England's World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina.

zh.title: "他是我最大的粉丝" - BBC评论员理查兹的父亲去世
zh.summary: BBC足球评论员米卡赫·理查兹的父亲林肯在英格兰与阿根廷世界杯半决赛开始前不久去世。理查兹在比赛直播中向父亲表示敬意。这一个人悲剧与一项重大体育赛事相交。

title: Argentina face disciplinary action over Falklands banner after semi-final
summary: Argentina's players displayed a banner supporting their country's Falkland Islands claims during semi-final victory celebrations. FIFA may impose disciplinary measures in response to the political gesture. The incident raised questions about conduct during international sporting events.
content: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

zh.title: 阿根廷因半决赛后的福克兰群岛横幅面临纪律处分
zh.summary: 阿根廷球员在半决赛胜利庆祝期间展示了支持该国福克兰群岛主张的横幅。国际足联可能会对这一政治姿态采取纪律措施。这一事件引发了关于国际体育赛事中行为准则的问题。

title: 'No regrets' - Tuchel on England's defeat by Argentina
summary: Manager Thomas Tuchel acknowledged England became too passive following their opening goal in the 2-1 semi-final defeat to Argentina. Despite the loss, he expressed no regrets about his tactical approach. The match took place at Atlanta Stadium with late Argentine goals securing victory.
content: England manager Thomas Tuchel believes his team "got too passive" after scoring first in the World Cup semi-final against Argentina, which they lost 2-1 at Atlanta Stadium.

zh.title: "没有遗憾" - 图赫尔谈英格兰对阿根廷的失利
zh.summary: 主教练托马斯·图赫尔承认，英格兰在打入1球后变得过于被动，最终在半决赛中以1:2不敌阿根廷。尽管失利，他对自己的战术安排表示没有遗憾。比赛在亚特兰大体育场进行，阿根廷的两个后期进球最终锁定胜局。

title: 'Gutted' - Kane disappointed over World Cup exit
summary: Captain Harry Kane expressed disappointment at England's World Cup exit following their semi-final defeat to Argentina in Atlanta. Kane offered analysis of the performance and factors contributing to the loss. His reaction reflects the squad's emotional response to elimination.
content: England captain Harry Kane gives his analysis on their defeat against Argentina in the 2026 World Cup semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.

zh.title: "失望至极" - 凯恩对世界杯出局感到沮丧
zh.summary: 队长哈里·凯恩对英格兰在亚特兰大半决赛中不敌阿根廷后的世界杯出局表示失望。凯恩分析了球队的表现和导致失利的因素。他的反应反映了全队对淘汰出局的情感回应。

title: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams in semi-final
summary: Argentina scored two late goals to overturn England's 1-0 lead and advance to the World Cup final with a 2-1 victory. The dramatic comeback in Atlanta eliminated Thomas Tuchel's team from the tournament. The late-game collapse proved decisive in determining the finalists.
content: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams, scoring two late goals to come from behind and knock out Thomas Tuchel's side, in a dramatic semi-final in Atlanta.

zh.title: 阿根廷在半决赛中粉碎英格兰的世界杯梦想
zh.summary: 阿根廷凭借两个后期进球，扭转了英格兰1:0的领先局面，最终以2:1的胜利晋级世界杯决赛。这场在亚特兰大进行的戏剧性逆转淘汰了图赫尔执教的英格兰队。比赛末段的崩盘在确定最终参赛队伍中起到了决定性作用。

title: Argentina celebrate progressing to World Cup final
summary: Defending champions Argentina defeated England 2-1 in the World Cup semi-final to secure a place in their second consecutive World Cup final. The victory was celebrated enthusiastically by the Argentina squad. This achievement represents a significant milestone for the team's campaign.
content: Defending champions Argentina celebrate at full time, after beating England 2-1 to make it through to their second successive World Cup final.

zh.title: 阿根廷庆祝晋级世界杯决赛
zh.summary: 卫冕冠军阿根廷在世界杯半决赛中以2-1击败英格兰，确保连续第二次晋级世界杯决赛。这场胜利受到了阿根廷队的热烈庆祝。这一成就代表了球队征程中的一个重要里程碑。

title: Fernandez fires in equaliser for Argentina
summary: Midfielder Enzo Fernandez scored the equalizing goal for Argentina during the World Cup semi-final against England at Atlanta Stadium. His finish brought the score level during the crucial match. The goal proved pivotal in Argentina's eventual comeback victory.
content: Enzo Fernandez equalises for Argentina against England in the 2026 World Cup semi final at the Atlanta Stadium.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯为阿根廷打入扳平球
zh.summary: 中场球员恩佐·费尔南德斯在亚特兰大球场进行的世界杯半决赛中为阿根廷打入扳平球。他的进球在这场关键比赛中使比分打成平手。这粒进球在阿根廷随后的逆转胜利中起到了关键作用。

title: Late Martinez header sends Argentina to World Cup final
summary: Substitute Lautaro Martinez scored the winning goal in the 92nd minute, heading in Lionel Messi's cross to secure Argentina's World Cup final place. The dramatic late winner came at England's expense in the semi-final. Martinez's goal exemplified Argentina's ability to capitalize on crucial moments.
content: Substitute Lautaro Martinez is in the right place at the right time to head home Lionel Messi's 92nd-minute cross to send Argentina to the World Cup final at the expense of England.

zh.title: 马丁内斯的后期头球将阿根廷送入世界杯决赛
zh.summary: 替补球员劳塔罗·马丁内斯在第92分钟头球破门，接梅西的传中，确保了阿根廷的世界杯决赛名额。这粒后期的戏剧性进球在半决赛中以英格兰的失利为代价。马丁内斯的进球体现了阿根廷在关键时刻抓住机会的能力。

title: Headers caused Stiles' brain disease, coroner finds
summary: England's 1966 World Cup winner Nobby Stiles died from a condition caused by repeatedly heading footballs, according to his inquest findings. The case highlights ongoing concerns about long-term neurological effects of heading in football.
content: England 1966 World Cup winner Nobby Stiles died with a condition caused by heading footballs, his inquest concludes.

title: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
summary: As England prepares to face Norway in the World Cup quarter-finals at Miami Stadium, the article compiles all goals scored by Thomas Tuchel's squad in their tournament run. The compilation showcases England's offensive output leading up to the quarter-final clash.
content: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.

zh.title: 英格兰2026年世界杯征程中的全部进球
zh.summary: 当英格兰准备在迈阿密球场与挪威争夺世界杯八强席位时，本文汇总了图赫尔麾下球队在本届赛事中的全部进球。这个合集展示了英格兰队在八强之战前的进攻威力。

title: All of Argentina's goals from the World Cup so far
summary: The video compilation shows all 17 goals scored by Argentina in their path to the World Cup semi-final, where they will face England. Argentina's prolific attack led them to this stage of the tournament.
content: Watch all 17 of Argentina's goals from World Cup 2026 on their way to the semi-final, where they face England.

zh.title: 阿根廷在世界杯上的全部进球
zh.summary: 视频合集展示了阿根廷在晋级世界杯半决赛过程中的全部17球，他们将在半决赛中对阵英格兰。阿根廷的强势进攻将他们带到了本届赛事的这一阶段。

title: Mates, mate and freedom - how Argentina got the best out of Messi
summary: Argentina's squad is strategically built around maximizing Lionel Messi's impact as they face England in the World Cup semi-finals. Analyst Guillem Balague explores how the team structure brings out the best in their legendary captain.
content: Guillem Balague examines how the Argentina squad is built around Lionel Messi as they prepare to play against England in the World Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 伙伴、玛黛茶与自由——阿根廷如何最大化梅西
zh.summary: 阿根廷队战略性地围绕最大化莱昂内尔·梅西的影响力组建,在世界杯半决赛中面对英格兰。分析师吉列姆·巴拉格探讨球队结构如何最大程度地发挥这位传奇队长的能力。

title: England's biggest match since 1966 as Three Lions close in on immortality
summary: England faces Argentina in a World Cup semi-final carrying historic weight, with success potentially matching the nation's legendary 1966 triumph. Phil McNulty examines why this match represents a watershed moment for the Three Lions.
content: England face Argentina in the World Cup semi-finals on Wednesday - and BBC Sport's Phil McNulty explains why it is the Three Lions' biggest match since 1966.

zh.title: 英格兰自1966年以来最重要的比赛,三狮逼近不朽
zh.summary: 英格兰在世界杯半决赛中面对阿根廷,这场比赛承载着历史的重量,成功可能与该国传奇的1966年胜利相媲美。菲尔·麦克纳蒂探讨了为什么这场比赛代表了三狮的分水岭时刻。

title: I still feel pain of '98 but this can be different for England - Shearer
summary: Alan Shearer remains haunted by England's 1998 World Cup loss to Argentina but believes the current squad has the opportunity to reverse that history. The legendary striker explains how this semi-final represents a chance for redemption.
content: England's defeat to Argentina at the 1998 World Cup still burns deep for Alan Shearer, but he explains why this team can take their chance to change their lives forever.

zh.title: 我仍感受到98年的伤痛,但英格兰这次可以不同——谢勒
zh.summary: 艾伦·谢勒仍然为英格兰1998年世界杯对阿根廷的失利感到困扰,但他相信目前的球队有机会改写这段历史。这位传奇前锋解释了这场半决赛如何代表了救赎的机会。

title: A special team beats brilliant individuals - how silky Spain flattened France
summary: Spain's cohesive, team-oriented approach overcame France's individual brilliance in their World Cup semi-final, with the Spanish advancing despite flying under the radar throughout the tournament. Their progression raises questions about whether collective excellence can carry them to the championship.
content: Spain have rather flown under the radar at the 2026 World Cup - but will they go all the way and win it?

zh.title: 特殊球队战胜天才个体 - 优雅的西班牙如何击败法国
zh.summary: 西班牙凝聚力强、注重团队的方式在世界杯半决赛中克服了法国的个人天才光芒，尽管西班牙在整个赛事中表现低调，他们仍然成功晋级。他们的晋级引发了一个问题：集体卓越能否将他们带往冠军之座。

title: Pressure is on world champions Argentina in semi-final - Guehi
summary: England defender Marc Guehi asserts that defending champions Argentina face the greater pressure heading into their World Cup semi-final clash. His confidence reflects England's mindset as they prepare to challenge the reigning title holders.
content: England defender Marc Guehi insists the pressure is on Argentina as the Three Lions prepare to face the reigning champions in the World Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 压力在世界冠军阿根廷身上 - 盖赫
zh.summary: 英格兰后卫马克·盖赫声称，卫冕冠军阿根廷在即将到来的世界杯半决赛中面临更大的压力。他的自信反映了英格兰队准备挑战卫冕冠军的心态。
